PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2007 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called with case#289992 (Natalie Toll Revocable Trust).

Appearances: Richard Bryan for Trustee. Irene Barrese for Natalie Tkachev, Church of Kazan, and Father Poluektov. Ms. Barrese also appearing for Mr. Bassi representing Mr. Selinsky.

Mr. Bryan reported that the matter settled, and requested that all matters be continued for 45 days to file a petition for approval of settlement. The matter was continued to January 28, 2008.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Raymond Leung.
